titleStmt.title: SII 9.160: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 160. (A.R. No. 235 of 1913.) ON A SLAB NEAR A WELL AT KOLAGALLU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 16, Prajāpati • • • • • 10, Bṛihaspativāra (Prajāpati = A.D. 1091-1092.) It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribuvanamalladēva, and records a grant of land made for the service of the god Mūlasthāna-Durggēśvara, for a matha and education, by the Brāhman Durgarāja, son of Pamparāja, who was the son of Durgasiṁha, the son of Ēcharāja of the Sāṅkhyāyana-gōtra and Vāji-kula.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti jayaścābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . viśuddhajñāna
dēhāya trivēdīdivyacakṣuṣē śrēyaḥprāptinimittāya namassō
mārddhadhāriṇē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaru . vṛtta . balavadvairivra
jaṁ taṁnaḍigeṟaguvinaṁ taṁna tējaṁ diśāmaṁḍaḷadoḷtaḷpoyvinaṁ
nativiśadayaśaḥśrīdiśādaṁtidaṁtōjvaḷamaṁ dikcakradoḷsaṁdaṇisi
janaṁ pāḷisuttiḻdanoḷpiṁdeḷeyaṁ saptābdhimēkhaḷeyanatibaḷaṁ vikramāditya
dēvaṁ . neṟe kūrppeṟe podaḷda vikramamahēbhṛdvikramakrīḍeyaṁ peṟa
bhaktiyiṁdame manaṁgoṁḍirppa kaṁdippa kālgeṟagippā geyvuttire
mūviṭṭigeydirppa poḍaraṁ dvṛttaripukṣmāpāḷa
tenisi negaḻda vikramādityadēvana vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhiv®
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire yire . śrīlōka
travājikuḷasāṁkyāyanagōtramaṁḍanaṁ
ttama sucaritrālaṁkāranapāra kuśalaṁ viśvanutaṁ kīrttilakṣmī
bhuvēcirājanesadaṁ viśvaṁbharācakradoḷu . Ātana tanayaṁ vi
pētaṁ niravadya viśvavidyāvibudhavrātanuta bhūbhuvanakhyātaṁ ta
varggaṁ durggaṁ vinayada nele dharmada tāyvane satyada janmabhūmi
māḷpana kaṇi vivēkadāgara gaṟaṁ durggaṁ vibhumahīmaṁḍa
Ā negaḻda durggasiṁhana sūnu nijanayanapayōjavanabhāskara
da nidhi vipuḷaśrīniḷayaṁ pampaṁ negaḻdaṁ jagadoḷ . toṇe peṟarārī
jagannutana baṇni nānivaha neleyāgi naga
nivaha tāne neleyāgi negaḷteyanānta sajjanapraṇutananaṇna baṇni
jana paṁparājanaṁ . Ene negaḻdapaṁpana manumārggana sati sa
te patibhakte negaḷtevaḍeye vanitājanaratnaṁ paḍeda
suvikhyā yāda paṁparājaṁgaṁ tiḷakaṁ puṭṭida
noḷaṁ nīti guṇada mane ṇamaccariya
nama tōrkuṁ saucamaṟivorṇnuḍi niścaḷasatvameṁbivakkāgaramāgi
timaṇḍaḷamellamaṁ yaśaśśrī māḍidunnatiyene negarda
sōluvī kāṁcīvibhramamanāntumadēnesediḻdudaṇna padmāḷi samagradi
na nābhipadmamaṁ haladavōlpararppuruṣarentu guṇōnnatiyiṁde
guṇapraṇutasadguṇavarggananemma durgganaṁ guṇigaḷaṁ tamagoldu
sauryyadi sadguṇamaṁ tāḷdida durggarājanoḷiḷāprakhyātanoḷārppa
haṇna me bhuvige sphuranmaṇiyoḷtōṟuva kāntiyo
ḷoḷ . Enibarba mahāmōdaṁ manumārgga durgana nanditāma
saṁpatpuṣṭavidvajjanajanatānaṁdanakāriyāyitene koḷgallu
māḍisidaṁ śivālayamanurvvīlōkasampūjyamaṁ
jikuḷatiḷakananavadyaguṇasthānaṁ durggamūlasthāna mahēśvaranija
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavariṣada 16 neya prajāpatisaṁva
10 bṛhaspativāradaṁdu mūlasthāna durggēśvarada
prāsāda maṭakkamalliya vidyādānakkaṁ tapō
garasamudāyada jīvita
radakke .
Digital edition of SII 9.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
